canonical_answer: A large white cardboard box sits on the left side containing loose red strawberries. Multiple clear plastic clamshell containers filled with red strawberries are arranged in stacks on the right side. A blue and white label with text is visible on the side of the cardboard box. Green leafy strawberry tops are attached to the fruit inside the containers.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: Red strawberries with green calyxes fill the clear plastic containers stacked on the right. A white cardboard box containing loose fruit rests on the left side of the brown wooden table. Green leafy plant material is visible in the bottom right corner near the containers. Text printing is visible on the blue label attached to the white box.

question: Describe the text visible on the white cardboard box throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, the text 'SCOOP/DISHER' appears on the blue label; at 4s, 'LITRE' becomes visible alongside it; at 10s, the label reads 'FOOD/DISHER' clearly; at 16s, the text shifts to show 'GROW/DISHER' near the bottom edge. Loose strawberries fill the white box on the left.

question: Describe how the plastic strawberry containers are arranged on the surface during the clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, seven plastic containers are arranged in two main columns on the right; at 6s, the containers remain stacked in rows on the brown surface; at 12s, six clear containers are visible in organized lines; at 16s, the stacks maintain their position beside the white box. Red strawberries fill the clear clamshells.
